title: Luffy Decides to Bring Sanji Back
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on luffy decides to bring sanji back within the The Team Divides Over Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: These relatives of his,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're the real key to all of this.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Is it his father? His mother? At any rate, we know they were in North Blue...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But then crossed over to east blue and now into the new world. Pretty crazy stuff, if you think about it.

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Vinsmoke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I feel like I've heard that name before...

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, everyone. If only...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'd managed to hold him back, at least until everyone else came...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: sanji's the one that didn't give you guys any options.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You all aren't responsible in the least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But, Robin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What if we never get to see him again!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then that's that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: granted, the way it stands...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's up and gone without so much as a "thank you for everything."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's not what I meant!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: or a "sorry for all the trouble."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Take a moment and think! We're on a bit of an express train here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Casaar told us, didn't he? The smile that doFlamingo was making,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It was intended for Kaidou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Punk Hazard

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Dressrossa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just as we angered Doflamingo by destroying the laboratory on punk hazard,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kaidou

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Our destruction of the factory on Dressrossa has angered none other than...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The Yonkou Kaidou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just like Jack, the man who destroyed this country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kaidou and his goons are no longer some far-off threat. It's just a matter of time until they chase us down and demand payback... in cold blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The main reason we even joined up with trafficy in the first place was to have his assistance in the upcoming fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's more, Kinemon and his friends, for an as of yet Unknown Reason...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: are also being targeted by Kaidou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sooner or later, we're going to have to throwdown with the man himself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And in the midst of all this, that curly eyebrowed idiot goes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And sticks his nose in the business of another yonkou, big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait a sec, that's not fair! He didn't stick his nose in anything! What happened is separate from all that other stuff!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't go making shitty excuses for him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do you mean!? Don't make light of another's troubles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Okay! We're never going to figure out what's happening if we just sit here and argue about it.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: So let's just go ask Sanji himself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oi, Luffy! Drop it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You tellin' me you wanna go pay big mom a visit!? You're the one that picked a fight with her! Or have you forgotten!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We can't just march in there without a plan or strategy! We'll get crushed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She's a yonkou, Luffy! Don't forget that. This person is on a completely different level than any of our opponents so far.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well, then, we can just sneak in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't make it sound so4 easy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: To be fair, it's not as if...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We have no way of tracking them down ....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHATA-!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Strum

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's right... Big Mom's crew forgot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A rather important person in their haste.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If he's awake,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Maybe we can ask him a thing or two.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: May as well pay him a visit then...

summary: Luffy Decides to Bring Sanji Back: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
